---
title: "Experience"
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

# Experience

::: {.exp-section}

<div class="exp-card">

<div class="exp-header">
  <div class="exp-company">Qualcomm</div>
  <div class="exp-meta">Business Analytics Consultant (Capstone) · Apr 2026 – Present</div>
</div>

<div class="exp-body">

<ul>
<li>Building predictive models to forecast NRE spend by integrating program, labor, and financial data</li>
<li>Improving forecast accuracy and cost visibility for strategic decision-making</li>
</ul>

</div>

</div>

<div class="exp-card">

<div class="exp-header">
  <div class="exp-company">POSCO International</div>
  <div class="exp-meta">Full-time · Mar 2014 – Jun 2025</div>
</div>

<div class="exp-body">

<strong>Business Operation Manager (FP&A, Strategy)</strong>
<span class="exp-submeta">Jul 2024 – Jun 2025</span>

<ul>
<li>Led long-term strategic planning through KPI development and multi-scenario financial modeling</li>
<li>Supported portfolio and investment decisions across production, pricing, and FX scenarios</li>
</ul>

<strong>Cost Controller, Offshore Gas Field Development Project (EPCIC)</strong>
<span class="exp-submeta">Jan 2021 – Jun 2024</span>

<ul>
<li>Managed financial operations for a multi-hundred-million-dollar EPCIC project</li>
<li>Led CAPEX forecasting, variance analysis, and executive reporting</li>
</ul>

<strong>Treasury Analyst (Trade Finance)</strong>
<span class="exp-submeta">Mar 2020 – Dec 2020</span>

<ul>
<li>Reduced financing costs through negotiation of L/C and Open Account transactions</li>
<li>Improved liquidity via receivables factoring and A/R cycle optimization</li>
</ul>

<strong>Enterprise Risk Analyst (Credit, A/R, Inventory, FX, Insurance, Compliance) </strong>
<span class="exp-submeta">Mar 2014 – Feb 2020</span>

<ul>
<li>Analyzed global counterparties to mitigate credit risk</li>
<li>Built SAP-based risk models and early warning systems</li>
</ul>

</div>

</div>

<div class="exp-card">

<div class="exp-header">
  <div class="exp-company">Early Experience</div>
</div>

<div class="exp-body">

<strong>Trade Finance Intern · Scotiabank</strong>
<span class="exp-submeta">Dec 2013 – Jan 2014 · Seoul, South Korea</span>

<ul>
<li>Reviewed L/C documentation and supported trade finance operations</li>
<li>Assisted with regulatory reporting to the Bank of Korea</li>
</ul>

<strong>Credit Risk Analyst Intern · POSCO International</strong>
<span class="exp-submeta">Jun 2013 – Oct 2013 · Seoul, South Korea</span>

<ul>
<li>Conducted credit risk analysis and prepared approval reports for senior management</li>
</ul>

</div>

</div>

</div>
